task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Oscar EMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oscar EMR dashboard or main schedule screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the record for Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's chart, eChart, or demographic page for 'Maria Santos' (Demographic No: 10001) is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the consultation request form for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Consultation Request', 'Add Consultation', or 'Referral' form is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the consultation is directed to the Cardiology service and specialist Dr. Robert Hartfield.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Service' dropdown or field shows 'Cardiology' and the 'Specialist' field shows 'Robert Hartfield' or 'Dr. Robert Hartfield'.

task_completion.description: Verify the urgency is set to Urgent and the referral date is filled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Urgency' or 'Status' field is set to 'Urgent' (or '1' / 'u') and the referral date field contains a date.

task_completion.description: Verify the reason for consultation and clinical information are entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text boxes for reason/clinical info contain the required details. Look specifically for the keywords 'chest pain', 'cardiac', 'st-segment', and 'stress test'.

task_completion.description: Verify the consultation request was submitted or saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message, a print preview of the finalized consultation, or the completed consultation record appearing in the patient's eChart list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Oscar EMR web interface rather than using backend scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Oscar EMR interface, with visible clicks, typing, or form interactions.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered or pasted the required information into the actual EMR fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is visible inside the proper HTML input fields or textareas of the Oscar EMR consultation form, not just in a separate text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly insert the consultation record into the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL 'INSERT' commands or API curl requests to the Oscar backend.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Patient: Maria Santos (Demographic No: 10001). Target Service: Cardiology (Service ID: 1). Target Specialist: Robert Hartfield. Required Urgency: 'Urgent' (or '1', 'u'). Required Clinical Keywords to look for in the text fields: 'chest pain', 'cardiac', 'st-segment', 'stress test'.
